title: How Iran is using China’s playbook to counter Donald Trump’s threats
description: Nearly six weeks of fighting between Iran and the United States have paused, but tensions remain after talks failed. Iran is responding by using control of the strait as leverage, similar to how China earlier countered US pressure using rare-earth supplies. This has already pushed oil prices higher and raised concerns over fuel costs and inflation. Iran has shown no sign of backing down, signalling a longer standoff ahead

description: New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel skipped a scheduled media session amid controversy involving Dianna Russini, following photos of them together in Arizona. While both denied any inappropriate relationship, Russini faces an internal review at The Athletic. Fans questioned Vrabel’s absence, calling it evasive, though some believe it was a strategic move to avoid distractions as the team focuses on upcoming draft preparations.

Out of missiles: US allies in Gulf turn to Asia for more ammo
description: Gulf nations, facing depleted air defence stockpiles due to sustained air bombardment, are urgently seeking alternative weapons suppliers beyond the US. Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar are exploring options from South Korea, Ukraine, and Britain, driven by Iranian retaliatory attacks and US delivery delays. This diversification highlights global arms production strains and a shifting defence landscape.

'Dhurandhar 2' day 26: Ranveer Singh film chases Rs 1100 crore milestone on 4th Monday
description: Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its record-shattering journey at the box office. On day 26 (fourth Monday), the Ranveer Singh-starrer has officially amassed over Rs 1,084 crore India net, solidifying its status as the highest-grossing Hindi film in history. Despite the intense IPL 2026 season, the film's strategic family-friendly edits and viral momentum have pushed its worldwide gross past the Rs 1,712 crore mark. Check out the detailed live tracking and daily collection breakdown here.

FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
description: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: From Rs 60 to Rs 60,000: Study reveals Jallianwala compensation scale, sparks ‘blood money’ debate
description: A study reveals Jallianwala Bagh compensation was calculated by income and dependents, leading to payouts from a few thousand rupees for deaths to under Rs 100 for minor injuries. This formula, linking life value to economic productivity, sparked public debate over "blood money" and colonial accountability.

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
description: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.
